title: Inception
description: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology.

title: The Matrix
description: A computer programmer discovers that reality as he knows it is a simulation.

title: 3 Idiots
description: Two friends are searching for their long lost companion. He is believed to have committed suicide.

title: Oppenheimer
description: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

title: Barbie
description: Barbie and Ken navigate their way through being human and making a difference in the real world.

title: Taare Zameen Par
description: A brilliant teacher reaches out to a boy with a learning disability to help him discover his latent potential.

title: Dune: Part Two
description: Paul Atreides travels to the dangerous planet Arrakis to ensure the future of his family and people.

title: Sholay
description: Two criminals are hired by a police officer to capture an outlaw. A classic Indian thriller.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his youngest son.

title: Killers of the Flower Moon
description: When oil is discovered in 1920s Oklahoma, the Osage Nation becomes wealthy but falls victim to a series of murders.

title: Dangal
description: Former wrestler Mahavir Singh Phogat turns his young daughters into world-class wrestlers.

title: Parasite
description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Piku
description: A romantic comedy about the relationship between a father and his daughter.

title: Five Nights at Freddy's
description: A security guard takes a night shift at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza and encounters supernatural horrors.
